data.title: Ripple tests RLUSD stablecoin-driven trade finance in the Monetary Authority of Singapore's sandbox.
data.description: Ripple has announced its participation in the Monetary Authority of Singapore's (MAS) BLOOM program, testing the application of its RLUSD stablecoin in cross-border trade payments within its regulatory sandbox. Ripple is partnering with supply chain finance technology provider Unloq to pilot a system based on XRP Ledger that automatically triggers cross-border trade payments using RLUSD when pre-defined conditions (such as freight verification) are met, replacing the traditional trade finance process that relies on manual verification and correspondent banking relationships. The pilot utilizes Unloq's SC+ platform, integrating trade obligations, settlement terms, and financing workflows into a single execution layer, with funds flowing through RLUSD on the XRP Ledger. This is Ripple's third significant move in three weeks, following its expansion of Ripple Payments into a full-stack stablecoin infrastructure platform and its acquisition of an Australian financial services license.

data.title: Gold Rebound Reduces Probability of Price Drop Below $4,300
data.description: The probability of gold prices falling below $4,300 by the end of March has decreased to 16%, following a significant rebound in the market this morning. According to NS3.AI, this shift in market sentiment is reflected in Polymarket's end-of-March gold price contract, which has seen trading volumes surpass $3 million.

data.title: James Wynn opened another short position in BTC, and it's once again close to the liquidation price.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, after being fully liquidated, James Wynn opened a short position of 1.31 BTC ($93,000) with 40x leverage. It is currently close to the liquidation price again, which is $71,936.49.

data.title: Fire Contained at Russia's Ust-Luga Port Following Drone Strike
data.description: A fire at Russia's Ust-Luga port was being contained after 56 drones were destroyed over the Leningrad region, according to local governor Alexander Drozdenko. Bloomberg posted on X that this incident marks the latest attack on Russia's oil export infrastructure. The situation underscores ongoing tensions and challenges in safeguarding critical energy facilities.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Prepares for Quantum Computing Threats with New Roadmap
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation has unveiled a new roadmap outlining how its development team plans to address the potential threats posed by quantum computing. According to Odaily, the foundation's quantum team anticipates that a series of initial network upgrades could be completed by 2029, involving four major hard forks.

The foundation acknowledges that quantum computing could eventually compromise the public key cryptography that secures ownership, authentication, and consensus in all digital systems. However, they do not expect this threat to materialize immediately. Researchers from the foundation's quantum team estimate that quantum computers with cryptographic capabilities may emerge in 8 to 12 years.

Among the four planned hard forks, the "I" fork will provide network validators with quantum-secure public keys, while the "J" fork aims to reduce the gas fees for verifying quantum-secure signatures. These upgrades are being considered for inclusion in the Hegota fork, expected later this year. The "L" fork will compress network state expressions into zero-knowledge proofs, and the "M" fork will protect Layer 2 networks from quantum threats.

Researchers indicate that Layer 1 protocol upgrades could be completed by 2029, but a full migration of the execution layer will require additional years beyond that. The Ethereum Foundation established a dedicated quantum team in January, and a developer testnet began testing some quantum features in March.

data.title: Japan's January Coincident Index Revised Upward to 117.9
data.description: Japan's coincident index for January has been revised to 117.9, up from the previous value of 116.8. According to Jin10, this adjustment reflects a more positive assessment of the country's economic activity during the month. The coincident index is a key indicator used to gauge the current state of the economy, incorporating various data points such as industrial production, employment, and retail sales. This upward revision suggests a stronger economic performance than initially estimated, providing a more optimistic outlook for Japan's economic conditions at the start of the year.

data.title: Binance Adds Brazilian Real as Collateral Asset on VIP Loan
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has introduced the Brazilian Real (BRL) as a new collateral asset for its VIP Loan service. This addition aims to enhance the flexibility and options available to users engaging in large personal and institutional over-collateralized loans. Binance VIP Loan offers competitive rates, terms, and services, catering to users seeking greater liquidity for long-term investment funds, leveraged trading, and hedging strategies.

Binance VIP Loan is designed to provide users with the ability to unlock greater potential in their financial objectives. The service is particularly beneficial for those looking to optimize their investment strategies through increased liquidity. Users can refer to Loan Data and VIP Loan sections for the latest interest rates and a comprehensive list of loanable and collateral assets. This strategic move by Binance is expected to attract users interested in leveraging the Brazilian Real for various financial activities, thereby expanding the platform's reach and utility.

The introduction of BRL as a collateral asset reflects Binance's commitment to offering diverse financial solutions to its users. By incorporating a widely used currency like the Brazilian Real, Binance aims to cater to a broader audience, including those in regions where BRL is prevalent. This initiative underscores Binance's focus on providing tailored financial services that meet the evolving needs of its global user base. Users are encouraged to explore the benefits of the VIP Loan service to maximize their investment opportunities and financial strategies.

data.title: Hong Kong's Pop Mart Shares Drop Over 12% Despite Strong Financial Results
data.description: Shares of Pop Mart International Group (09992.HK) fell more than 12% in the afternoon trading session. According to Jin10, the company's financial report revealed a revenue of 37.12 billion yuan for the fiscal year 2025, marking a 184.7% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, the profit attributable to shareholders reached 12.775 billion yuan, representing a 308.8% year-on-year growth.

data.title: Philippine Congress Requests Asset Statements in Duterte Impeachment Inquiry
data.description: A Philippine congressional panel has directed the ombudsman to present the statements of assets and liabilities of Vice President Sara Duterte. Bloomberg posted on X, this request is part of the ongoing examination of impeachment complaints filed against her. The panel's decision marks a significant step in the investigation, as it seeks to scrutinize Duterte's financial disclosures. The impeachment complaints have raised questions about her conduct and financial transparency. The congressional panel's move underscores the importance of accountability and transparency in public office. The outcome of this inquiry could have implications for Duterte's political future and the broader political landscape in the Philippines.

data.title: 币安AI交易代理开启公测  支持现货、永续合约下单及杠杆借贷
data.description:
据币安公告，币安将于2026年3月25日15:00（东八区时间）公测基于OpenClaw开源生态构建的AI交易代理Binance Ai Pro测试版。用户可以通过币安App安卓端（Android）中的币安Ai功能激活使用，或直接在币安官网主页顶部入口进入，以体验智能交易助手。
币安Ai Pro可一键激活、云端服务自动搭建、配置模型并关联可交易账户，支持接入多种主流AI模型，包括但不限于：ChatGPT、Claude、Qwen、MiniMax、Kimi等，并且集成常用第三方AI Skills和所有币安 Skills。
系统会自动为用户创建AI子账户并绑定一个API Key。API Key不具备提现和转账权限，用于降低操作风险并实现主账户与AI子账户间的资金隔离。
用户可以手动从主账户划转资金到AI子账户，让AI启用相关策略，执行交易或资产监控功能。AI可协助您完成多种操作，包括但不限于：
AI子账户现货和永续合约下单杠杆借贷加密市场价格分析链上钱包地址币种分布查询自定义交易策略执行

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of gold falling below $4,300 by the end of March is currently reported as 16%, a 40% decrease in the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, with the sharp rebound in gold prices this morning, the probability of gold falling below $4,300 by the end of March on Polymarket has dropped to 16%, a 40% decrease in 24 hours; in addition, the probability of gold falling below $4,000 by the end of March has dropped to 4%, a 12% decrease in 24 hours. As of now, the trading volume of gold price prediction contracts for the end of March on Polymarket has exceeded $3 million. According to Gate data, spot gold is currently trading at $4,570.41, a 24-hour increase of 2.15%, while spot silver has risen to $73.5, a 24-hour increase of 3.51%. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Swiss Private Bank Faces Closure Amid U.S. Money Laundering Allegations
data.description: A prominent Swiss private bank, previously recognized as one of the most prosperous in the country, has been forced to close following allegations from the U.S. government of money laundering activities involving Iranian clients. Bloomberg posted on X that the bank's operations have come under scrutiny due to these serious accusations, leading to its eventual shutdown. The allegations have raised concerns about the bank's compliance with international financial regulations and its role in facilitating illicit transactions. The closure marks a significant development in the ongoing efforts to combat money laundering and enforce stricter financial oversight. The bank's downfall serves as a cautionary tale for other financial institutions regarding the importance of adhering to global standards and maintaining transparency in their operations.

data.title: Investors Advised on Timing for Asian Stock Trades Amid Oil Price Fluctuations
data.description: Investors looking to trade Asian stocks in response to oil price changes are advised to act swiftly at the start of the trading day. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting UBS's recommendation to execute trades within the initial minutes of market opening and then refrain from further activity. This strategy is suggested to capitalize on immediate market reactions and avoid potential volatility later in the day. UBS's guidance comes as oil prices continue to influence stock market dynamics across Asia.

data.title: XRP Holds Steady Amid Whale Accumulation
data.description: XRP maintained its position near $1.41 after experiencing a slight increase of approximately 0.6% from around $1.38. According to NS3.AI, the cryptocurrency's price remained within a narrow range of $1.38 to $1.43. During this period of consolidation, whale wallets reportedly accumulated around 40 million XRP over the past week.

data.title: Pop Mart's Annual Revenue and Profit Align with Analyst Expectations
data.description: Pop Mart reported its full-year revenue and net income, which closely matched analyst predictions. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's strong performance, driven by robust sales of its globally popular Labubu dolls. The figures reflect Pop Mart's ability to maintain its market position and meet financial forecasts, underscoring the brand's continued appeal and commercial success.

data.title: India's Central Bank May Sell Dollars to Ease Rupee Pressure
data.description: India's central bank is reportedly considering selling U.S. dollars to alleviate pressure on the rupee, according to Jin10. The move comes as the rupee faces challenges in the foreign exchange market, prompting the Reserve Bank of India to explore measures to stabilize the currency. Analysts suggest that such interventions could help manage volatility and support the rupee's value against the dollar. The central bank's actions are closely watched by investors and market participants, as they could influence broader economic conditions and capital flows in the region.

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation expects to complete the quantum security upgrade by 2029.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation released a new roadmap on Tuesday outlining how its development team is preparing for the threat of quantum computing. The Foundation's quantum team anticipates a series of initial upgrades to the network by 2029, primarily involving four key hard forks. The Foundation states that quantum computing will eventually break public-key cryptography, which protects ownership, authentication, and consensus in all digital systems, but this threat is not expected to materialize immediately. Researchers on the Foundation's quantum team anticipate that cryptographically capable quantum computing will not emerge for another 8 to 12 years. Of the four hard forks, the "I" fork will provide quantum-safe public keys to network validators, and the "J" fork will reduce the gas fees for verifying quantum-safe signatures; these two upgrades are already being considered for the Hegota fork, expected later this year. The "L" fork will compress the network state representation into zero-knowledge proofs, and the "M" fork will protect Layer 2 networks from quantum threats. Researchers say the Layer 1 protocol upgrades can be completed by 2029, while a full execution layer migration will take several more years afterward. The Ethereum Foundation established a dedicated quantum team in January of this year, and the developer testnet began testing some quantum functions in March.

data.title: Aster has launched BR (Bedrock) perpetual contracts, supporting leverage up to 25x.
data.description: Aster announced on its X platform that it has launched the BR perpetual contract trading pair, supporting leverage up to 25x. Users can earn 1.2x trading credits before 23:59 UTC on March 29th.

data.title: CIMG and Bedrock Explore Institutional DeFi Solutions with BTC Liquid Staking Focus
data.description: CIMG has entered into a non-binding memorandum of understanding with Bedrock to investigate compliant institutional-grade decentralized finance (DeFi) solutions, with an initial focus on Bitcoin liquid staking. According to NS3.AI, the collaboration between the two entities is contingent upon further negotiations and formal agreements. The memorandum outlines the potential for cooperation, but emphasizes that any partnership will require additional discussions and formalization.

data.title: Public App Expands Retirement Account Options to Include Cryptocurrency Trading
data.description:
Public, an investment application, has announced support for U.S. Individual Retirement Accounts (IRA) and Roth IRAs to facilitate cryptocurrency trading. According to PANews, the platform now allows users to manage cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana alongside stocks and options, enabling a more unified retirement investment portfolio.

Previously, Public acquired Alto's crypto retirement account business for $65 million, with assets under management totaling approximately $600 million.
